card_description: The UFO people is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick introduces a seminal breakthrough: viewing "anamnesis" (memory) as a literal organ of perception that allows one to see the divine organism (Brahman) extending through time, just as the eyes see it in space."
